name: Creme De Menthe Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine unsweetened chocolate and butter in a small, heavy saucepan; cook over low heat, stirring constantly, until melted. Let stand for 10 minutes.
2. Beat eggs at medium speed of an electric mixer until thick and lemon-colored; gradually add sugar, beating well.
3. Add flour, salt, vanilla, and chocolate mixture; beat on low speed for 1 minute.
4. Spoon the mixture into a lightly greased and floured 13x9x2 inch pan.
5. Bake at 350°F for 25 to 30 minutes or until a wooden pick inserted in the center comes out clean. Cool for 10 minutes.
6. Spread Creme de Menthe Frosting over the top. Chill at least 4 hours.
7. Drizzle melted chocolate over frosting or pipe in desired design using metal tip No.3 or 4.
8. Cut into bars immediately. Remove from pan and chill at least 1 hour before serving. Store in an airtight container in the refrigerator. Yield: 4 dozen.
